home.hero_sub: We design, build and run high-performance storefronts on Shopify and beyond, for brands that want growth without the friction.
home.services_h2: Everything between idea and order confirmed.
home.services_subline: One partner for build, marketplace and marketing, across every platform you sell on.
home.svc1_desc: Custom sites and headless builds engineered for speed, SEO and conversion, pixel-faithful to your brand.
home.svc2_desc: Shopify, WooCommerce and more, theme, catalogue and checkout set up to sell from day one.
home.svc3_desc: Amazon, Flipkart and every major platform, listings, catalogue, ads and account health, handled.
home.svc4_desc: Performance campaigns across Google, Meta, X and Amazon Ads, every dollar tracked to revenue.
home.svc5_desc: Content, calendars, community and growth, a feed that builds the brand between launches.
home.svc6_desc: Talented product designers sit with you to design your dream product, from first sketch to production-ready specs.
home.svc7_desc: Branding consultation and operations, identity, voice and the guidelines that keep every touchpoint on-brand.
home.case1_desc: Fully built Shopify store, a 1.1s storefront and checkout rebuilt around the customer.
home.case2_desc: CRO + merchandising retainer. 14 straight months of growth.
home.case3_desc: Built catalogue and full inventory system for 4.6k-SKUs.
home.proc1_desc: We map your stack, data and funnel to find where revenue leaks.
home.proc2_desc: Systemised UX and brand-true interfaces, prototyped fast.
home.proc3_desc: Engineered, tested and launched, fast stores that hold up.
home.proc4_desc: We stay on, optimising, merchandising, keeping the line up.
home.cta_sub: Tell us where you are and where you want to be. We'll map the straightest line to get there.

services.sint_desc: From the storefront you build to the marketplaces you sell on and the campaigns that drive demand, seven services, one accountable partner.
services.s1_body: Custom websites and headless builds, fast by default. We sweat Core Web Vitals, SEO and the details that turn visits into orders.
services.s2_h2: Ready to sell from day one.
services.s2_body: We stand up complete stores on Shopify, WooCommerce and beyond, theme, catalogue, payments and checkout, configured to your operations.
services.s3_h2: Win on every platform you sell on.
services.s3_body: Full account management for Amazon, Flipkart and the rest, listings, cataloguing, advertising and the operational health that keeps you ranking.
services.s4_body: Full-funnel performance marketing across every channel that matters, Google, Meta, X and Amazon Ads, with every rupee tracked to revenue.
services.s5_h2: A feed that builds the brand.
services.s5_body: Always-on content, community and growth, the day-to-day presence that keeps your brand alive between launches and campaigns.
services.s6_h2: Design the product, not just the page.
services.s6_body: Talented product designers sit with you to shape your dream product, from first sketch to production-ready specs, grounded in how people actually shop.
services.s7_h2: A brand people remember and trust.
services.s7_body: Branding consultation and operations, identity, voice and the guidelines that keep every touchpoint consistent as you scale.
services.tier1_desc: A defined scope, timeline and price, for a new store, replatform or site build.
services.tier2_desc: Ongoing marketplace, marketing and social management, a team on call every month.
services.tier3_desc: A focused audit and roadmap when you need direction before you commit to a build.
services.cta_h2: Tell us what you sell. We'll handle the rest.
services.cta_sub: One conversation to map the straightest line from where you are to where you want to be.
